meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Slow Development
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to accelerate your dev velocity. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to build faster, smarter applications.
content.answer_block: Slow development often stems from manual UI boilerplate and fragmented user flows. By implementing automated, modular user onboarding, you decouple core feature development from user acquisition logic. Using Antigravity to scaffold components and Claude Code to iterate on logic, you can slash setup time by 70% and ship features faster.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank IDE, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat, mocking your progress. You have the vision for a world-class SaaS, but the friction of building repetitive onboarding flows is turning your dream project into a graveyard of abandoned repositories. Every hour spent manually wiring up sign-up modals and welcome tutorials is an hour stolen from your core product innovation.

But here is the secret: elite engineers don't write onboarding from scratch. They architect systems that build themselves. By leveraging AI-assisted scaffolding and intelligent CLI agents, you can transform your workflow from a grueling manual chore into a high-velocity assembly line. It is time to stop coding like a student and start building like a technical founder.

steps.title: Define Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Establish a JSON-based state machine for your onboarding steps to avoid hardcoding UI logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, reusable TypeScript schema for a multi-step user onboarding flow including progress tracking and data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a new onboarding-schema.ts file based on the Antigravity output and place it in the /src/types directory.'

steps.title: Scaffold UI Components
steps.description: Create modular, headless onboarding components that accept your schema as props.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a React component library for onboarding slides with Framer Motion transitions and accessible accessibility hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate component files for OnboardingSlide and OnboardingContainer using Tailwind CSS for styling.'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to a global store to persist user progress across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Zustand store to track the current step, user completion status, and skip logic for the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize the onboarding store in /src/store/useOnboarding.ts and link it to the UI components.'

steps.title: Integrate API Sync
steps.description: Ensure user progress is saved to your backend database automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function to PATCH user onboarding progress to a Supabase backend whenever the step changes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the syncOnboardingProgress function in /src/services/api.ts and call it on step change.'

steps.title: Final QA and Edge-Case Handling
steps.description: Test the flow for mobile responsiveness and user 'skip' scenarios.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the onboarding flow covering user completion, skipping, and network failure states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Run unit tests for the onboarding components and fix any dependency injection issues found.'

pro_tips: Always use a headless approach for onboarding; separate the business logic from the UI to allow for A/B testing later.
Implement a 'skip' button from day one; forcing users through long flows is the #1 cause of churn in student projects.
Use local storage as a cache for onboarding progress to ensure a snappy feel even on high-latency connections.
Tag your onboarding steps with analytics events immediately; you need data to know where users drop off.
Keep your onboarding flow under 4 steps; if you need more, you are likely over-explaining your product.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on building a 'Dashboard' landing page that dynamically changes based on the data collected during the onboarding process.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build professional onboarding in hours instead of weeks. Stop letting boilerplate slow down your career trajectory. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
